description: Happy path: scan all deals within 180-day lookback returns priority-ranked renewal candidates with concrete reasons

expect.scanned_deals: integer count of closed/fulfilled records read before filtering
expect.renewal_candidates: array sorted by priority descending then exclusivity_expires ascending
expect.candidate_fields: each candidate has deal_id, brand_name, closed_date, exclusivity_expires, renewal_reason, priority
expect.priority_values: each priority is exactly high, medium, or low
expect.renewal_reason: each reason cites a concrete date or threshold, not vague language
expect.recommended_next_step: non-empty string derived from the candidate list

prohibit: fabricated deal_id, brand_name, or closed_date values
estimated or inferred exclusivity_expires when field is absent from record
vague renewal_reason such as 'looks ready' without citing a specific date or threshold
renewal_candidates sorted incorrectly (must be priority desc, then exclusivity asc)

description: Minimal input: defaults applied; no account_id and default lookback_days

expect.renewal_candidates: array present, may be empty if no qualifying deals
expect.recommended_next_step: if candidates empty, states 'no renewal candidates found within the current parameters'

prohibit: fabricated deal data to populate an empty candidate list
recommended_next_step that gives generic advice not derived from the actual candidate list

description: Edge case: deal record missing exclusivity_expires and closed_date; atom emits gap-record and continues scanning

expect.scanned_deals: integer reflecting all records read including incomplete ones
expect.gap_handling: deals with missing closed_date emit a gap-record noting the missing field rather than halting
expect.exclusivity_handling: deals without exclusivity_expires are scored on closed_date alone with gap noted in renewal_reason
expect.renewal_candidates: array present; incomplete records are either excluded with gap note or included with null fields

prohibit: atom halting or erroring on incomplete records instead of continuing the scan
fabricated closed_date or exclusivity_expires for records missing those fields
priority scored using an estimated exclusivity date
silent omission of records without a gap note explaining why
